response.justification: James is a versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of experience across web, mobile, and backend systems, strong testing/TDD craftsmanship, and some high-throughput systems exposure at Dunnhumby. However, the role is a Principal (IC6) position focused specifically on growth and experimentation systems, and his resume shows no experimentation platform, feature-flagging, A/B testing, or metrics/telemetry infrastructure experience. There is also little evidence of principal-level scope — leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives or building platforms adopted across many teams. The gap between his profile and the core domain requirements is too large to recommend an interview.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and open-source contributions
High-throughput, low-latency systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth measurement platform experience
No demonstrated principal-level scope (multi-team initiatives, org-wide platforms, architecture leadership)
Limited evidence of data/statistical analysis aptitude required for experimentation quality and bias detection

key_factors.factor: Solid engineering fundamentals and testing culture
